policy: These are unverified search and document targets for editorial or librarian confirmation. Do not format as APA 7 until each source is retrieved and checked. No fabricated DOI or PMID.

suggestedSources.label: heart failure pulmonary edema pathophysiology review
suggestedSources.notes: Prefer recent peer-reviewed reviews; confirm year and journal at retrieval.

suggestedSources.notes: Verify edition year your editorial team will cite.
